name: Ashes to Ashes
descs: Combat Start: if all enemies (or all Abnormality parts) have [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn', inflict 2 [Combustion] Potency on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts).
Combat Start: <style="upgradeHighlight">inflict 2 [Combustion] Potency on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts) with [Combustion] or 'Unique Burn'</style>.
Combat Start: <style="upgradeHighlight">inflict 3 [Combustion] Potency on all enemies (or all Abnormality parts)</style>.
